name: Speed Stars
author: Poki
description: Get ready to feel the ultimate rush in Speed Stars, a thrilling running game that puts your reflexes and timing to the test. Sprint through intense races inspired by classic track and field events as you chase victory and perfect every stride. Customize your athlete, hone your skills, beat personal bests, and compete on worldwide leaderboards. Easy to learn but hard to master—do you have what it takes to become a Speed Star? How do I play Speed Stars? Use the A and D or the Left and Right arrow keys to run! Who created Speed Stars? Speed Stars is created by Luke. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Speed Stars for free? You can play Speed Stars for free on Poki. Can I play Speed Stars on mobile devices and desktop? Speed Stars can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
